title: Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree
why_this_song: Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree by Brenda Lee (1958) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Mistletoe hung where you can see
Deck the halls with boughs of holly

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "christmas" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "christmas" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rockin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rockin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Later we'll have some pumpkin pie

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree" was released in 1958. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree" foi lançada em 1958. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Brenda Lee one question about "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Brenda Lee sobre "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
